nasb.text: Of clean animals and animals that are not clean and birds and everything that creeps on the ground,

esv.text: Of clean animals, and of animals that are not clean, and of birds, and of everything that creeps on the ground,

cnv.text: 潔淨的牲畜和不潔淨的牲畜，飛鳥和各種在地上爬行的動物，

ccb.text: 洁净的动物、不洁净的动物、飞禽和地上的一切爬虫，

csbs.text: 洁净的牲畜和不洁净的牲畜，飞鸟和地上一切爬行之物，
